The company behind Sensa is so confident you’ll see results, they’re allowing new customers a chance to try Sensa free for 30 days.
By enhancing smell, 'Sensa Tastant' was designed to trigger your 'I feel full' signal, so you eat less and feel more satisfied.
Synaptics often has to retrofit its cutting-edge hardware into existing consumer hardware, but for this, had to manufacture Sensa entirely from scratch.
